translations.en: a gypsy wench with a voluptuous figure.
translations.zh: 身材豐盈的吉普賽女子。

translations.en: "Hello, wench. How goes it?"
translations.zh: 「你好，姑娘。近況如何？」

translations.en: "Well, hello handsome! Looking for a little... relaxation?"
translations.zh: 「哦，你好，帥哥！在找點……放鬆嗎？」

translations.en: "Well this is the place!"
translations.zh: 「這裡就是了！」

translations.en: "Ha! You must be afraid of what your mother might think."
translations.zh: 「哈！你肯定是怕你媽知道了怎麼想。」

translations.en: "They call me '@Wicked Wanda,' $0."
translations.zh: 「他們叫我『@Wicked（壞汪）達』，$0。」

translations.en: "If we can find someplace @private, I'll gladly show you how I got my nickname..."
translations.zh: 「若我們能找個@private（僻靜）的地方，我很樂意讓你知道我的綽號是怎麼來的……」

translations.en: "Hmm, sounds like I've piqued your interest..."
translations.zh: 「嗯，聽起來我已勾起你的興趣……」

translations.en: "Why
madam
translations.zh: 夫人

translations.en: sirrah
translations.zh: 先生

translations.en: , are you trying to insinuate something?"
translations.zh: ，您這是在暗示什麼嗎？」

translations.en: She breaks into a fit of giggles.
translations.zh: 她忍不住咯咯笑起來。

translations.en: "We don't have... Oh, wait, there was something!"
translations.zh: 「我們沒有……哦，等等，好像是有那麼回事！」

translations.en: "@Arturos, he, uh, found a map last time we were up at Empath @Abbey."
translations.zh: 「@Arturos（阿圖）羅斯，呃，上次我們去悲憫@Abbey（修道）院時他找到了一張地圖。」

translations.en: "He'll tell your @fortune for you, $0. Just ask him!"
translations.zh: 「他可以為你算@fortune（命），$0。去問他就是了！」

translations.en: "That's right."
translations.zh: 「對，就是。」

translations.en: "I don't care much for them. They're all too stuck up."
translations.zh: 「我不太喜歡他們。個個都太自命清高。」

translations.en: "@Andreas has a silver tablet you could ask him about."
translations.zh: 「@Andreas（安德）烈亞斯有塊銀板，你可以去問他。」

translations.en: "But I have something much @sweeter for sale..."
translations.zh: 「但我有更@sweeter（甜蜜）的東西出售……」

translations.en: "He could show you a real good time, honey!"
translations.zh: 「他能讓你玩得很開心，甜心！」

translations.en: "He's in the same line of work as I am--but I think I'm more your type!"
translations.zh: 「他跟我做同一行——但我覺得我更合你的口味！」

translations.en: "'Tis tiring work, you know."
translations.zh: 「這工作很累人，你知道的。」

translations.en: "'Twas a business doing pleasure with you... I hope you come again soon!"
translations.zh: 「跟你做生意真是享受……希望你快快再來！」

translations.en: "See you around... And if you meet anyone tall, dark and handsome, send 'em my way!"
translations.zh: 「保重……若你遇到又高又壯又英俊的人，把他們送到我這來！」

translations.en: "If you ever decide you need a break from adventuring, come find me again."
translations.zh: 「若你哪天決定想從冒險中喘口氣，再來找我。」

translations.en: "Why concern yourself with that, $0?"
translations.zh: 「為何為那事費心，$0？」

translations.en: "Surely you can think of something more pleasant..."
translations.zh: 「你肯定能想到更愉快的事……」

translations.en: "Again, so soon? Nay, come back later, when I've had a little time to @rest."
translations.zh: 「又來了，這麼快？不，晚些再來，讓我@rest（休息）一下。」

translations.en: "I don't get many lady customers... but why not? You're sure this is what you want?"
translations.zh: 「我不常接待女性顧客……但為何不呢？你確定這是你想要的？」

translations.en: "I've a cot in my wagon... 15 gold's the price--and I don't haggle! Interested, $0?"
translations.zh: 「我篷車裡有張床……收費15枚金幣——不砍價！有意嗎，$0？」

translations.en: $Y speaks. "I don't think we have time for this..."
translations.zh: $Y說道：「我覺得我們沒有時間做這個……」

translations.en: A voice in the back of your head asks, "Do you really have time for this?"
translations.zh: 腦後有個聲音問道：「你真的有時間做這個嗎？」

translations.en: "Come on, $0. Cross my palm with 15 gold and I'll show you a good time. Okay?"
translations.zh: 「來吧，$0。往我手心放15枚金幣，我讓你玩個痛快。好嗎？」

translations.en: "Fine! Come back when you get permission from your mother!"
translations.zh: 「好吧！等你媽媽批准了再來！」

translations.en: "Hey, I don't give credit! No pay, no play, capish?"
translations.zh: 「嘿，我不賒帳！沒錢沒服務，明白？」

translations.en: Taking you by the hand, the gyspy wench leads you off to her wagon.
translations.zh: 那吉普賽女子拉起你的手，帶你去她的篷車。

translations.en: After a time, you return to your comrades.
translations.zh: 過了一會兒，你回到同伴身邊。

translations.en: "That's a fine way to be carrying on when all of Britannia is in danger!"
translations.zh: 「整個不列顛尼亞都在危難中，你卻這樣鬼混！」

translations.en: "When our quest is complete, then there will be time enough for wenching!"
translations.zh: 「等試煉完成，再來尋歡作樂！」

translations.en: "Nothing's wrong with a little fun. There's plenty of time... as long as there's plenty of gold!"
translations.zh: 「享樂一下沒什麼不對。時間很多……只要金幣也很多！」

translations.en: You try to ignore the nagging voice in the back of your mind that keeps saying, "You shouldn't have wasted time like that."
translations.zh: 你試圖無視腦後那個不斷念叨「你不該這樣浪費時間」的聲音。

translator_notes: 汪達（壞汪達）是吉普賽妓女，口語輕佻，對男女玩家各有不同開場台詞。成人服務收費15金幣。capish（義大利語）意譯為「明白」。
